title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 426.270 - On return of citation, court may order inventory and bond filed or dismiss assignee
text:
426.270.  On return of citation, court may order inventory and bond filed or dismiss assignee. — On the return of the citation, the court may require the assignee to file an inventory and to give bond, with good and sufficient security, in such time as it may deem reasonable, or may proceed at once to dismiss such assignee from his trust.
(RSMo 1939 § 5765) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 5655; 1919 § 651; 1909 § 924
